case_title: JACKSON GROUP PROPERTY MANAGEMENT VS. RAMI IRIQAT et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JACKSON GROUP PROPERTY MANAGEMENT AS TO DEFENDANT IRIQAT, RAMI DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JACKSON GROUP PROPERTY MANAGEMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IRIQAT, RAMI THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 935 O'FARRELL STREET, #25, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, **INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS IN THE PREMISES**
